caption: A woman with dark, shoulder-length hair and glasses is positioned centrally against a solid dark grey background. She is wearing a light green, long-sleeved tunic with delicate floral embroidery around the neckline and a dark beaded necklace. A small black lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her garment. Throughout the sequence, she is speaking, with her facial expressions and mouth movements changing as she talks. In the first frame, she has a slight smile; in the second, her mouth is more open; in the third, she squint her eyes slightly while speaking; and in the fourth, she returns to a softer expression. In the bottom left and top right corners of the images, a small logo is visible featuring the text "NPTEL". The camera angle remains a static medium shot throughout the clip.
